rationale_per_step.surface-research-freshness-ux: Feature improvement / UI/UX + agent research: surface research run started_at/completed_at (and duration) in ResearchViewer or ResearchSummary header. Users currently see company.last_synced_at (hero/card) but not freshness of the deep research intelligence itself. Advances evidence-backed + fresh outcomes and trust. Selected to deliver direct vision value on 'fresh' after recent company-data freshness work.
rationale_per_step.canonical-verify-usage: DX/Infra: now that the 'verify' script exists and fully chains lint + typecheck + build + eval:smoke, update AGENTS.md (and align CI/docs if minimal) to use the single canonical command. Rebalances category mix after testing density; zero-risk DX win that makes harness contributions easier.
rationale_per_step.expand-research-eval-scenarios: Testing/Observability: expand scenario coverage in research-orchestrator-mock-eval (or add lightweight checks) for result shape, non-empty sources, metadata presence, and basic non-obvious signals. Directly closes more of the measurable research quality + reliable deep research loop from vision. Builds on existing hermetic mock pattern.
